hero_subtitle_line1: Built for recruiting teams, TrueCalling turns a job description into qualified candidates in minutes.
hero_subtitle_line2: EMILY™, our AI copilot, handles matching and multichannel outreach on WhatsApp, email, and phone.
trust_h2: Built for European HR & legal teams.
trust_lede: GDPR-compliant by design. Candidate data lives in the EU and never leaves the platform without explicit consent.
trust_b1_desc: Lawful basis, retention rules, DPA, candidate consent flows. Documented end-to-end.
trust_b2_desc: All candidate data hosted in EU regions (Frankfurt). Zero transfer outside the EEA without SCCs.
trust_b3_title: Never used to train external models
trust_b3_desc: Your candidate data is yours. Period. We don't sell, share, or feed it to third-party LLMs.
trust_b4_desc: Every action on the platform is logged. Role-based access for sourcers, hiring managers and finance.
roi_h2: How much would TrueCalling save your team?
roi_lede: Plug your numbers in. We'll compute time and cost saved — no email needed.
roi_input_cost: Cost of an unfilled role per day ($)
roi_assumption: Estimated using a 40 % time-to-hire reduction observed across TrueCalling pilot cohorts (internal data, 2026).
roi_cta: See it live in a 20-min demo
features_subtitle: AI sourcing, matching and candidate engagement — on a single platform.
f1_desc: Our AI models analyze candidate experience, skills and contextual signals to identify the best fit — and explain why.
f2_desc: EMILY engages and qualifies candidates on WhatsApp before recruiters even enter the conversation.
f3_desc: Candidates are ranked through semantic analysis and contextual signals — not just keywords.
f4_desc: Access over 1.2 billion globally sourced profiles, continuously updated.
f5_desc: Reach candidates where they are truly active, with automated follow-ups and reminders.
f6_desc: Find relevant candidates in minutes through domain-aware search and semantic intelligence.
emily_subtitle: The first AI copilot that engages candidates directly on WhatsApp, with over 90% open rates.
emily_c1_desc: While LinkedIn InMail caps at 18–25%, EMILY reaches candidates where they actually reply.
emily_c2_desc: EMILY asks the right questions, filters profiles and only forwards qualified candidates.
emily_c3_desc: Smart follow-ups and automatic scheduling without human intervention.
how_subtitle: From brief to qualified candidate in five steps — without switching tools.
s1_desc: Describe your ideal candidate in natural language. Our AI understands your requirements instantly.
s2_desc: Our AI scans 1.2B+ profiles and identifies the best candidates in minutes.
s3_desc: Evaluate candidates with the AI score (match, resilience and digital reputation) and build your shortlist.
s4_desc: In one click, EMILY contacts selected candidates on WhatsApp with personalized messages.
s5_desc: Qualified candidates are automatically transferred to your ATS (Workday, Greenhouse, SAP SuccessFactors, etc.).

st1_desc: Find qualified candidates in minutes instead of days.
st2_desc: Engage candidates where they actually read their messages.
st3_desc: The AI score identifies the best candidate.
st4_desc: Cut manual sourcing, outreach and screening.
st5_desc: Hire candidates aligned with the role and culture.
st6_desc: Scale your hiring without growing the team.
ats_subtitle: Connect TrueCalling to your ATS and keep your hiring workflow intact.
ats1_desc: Candidates and openings sync automatically between TrueCalling and your ATS.
ats2_desc: Get instant updates the moment a candidate status changes.
ats3_desc: Candidate and job statuses stay in sync with no manual work.
ats4_desc: Customize mapping and sync rules to match your process.
case_subtitle: This is what a real sourcing workflow looks like with TrueCalling.
case_h4: From sourcing to conversation in under 48h
case_quote: LinkedIn is a database; TrueCalling starts the conversation. Finding the right people is easy — getting them to reply is the real challenge. In under 48 hours, we had 5 qualified candidates in active conversation. It's an engagement level I'd never seen anywhere else.

pricing_faq_a2: Yes. Upgrade or downgrade anytime; the difference is prorated.
pricing_faq_a3: Unlimited ATS integrations, advanced search, a dedicated success manager, custom SLAs and DPA. Pricing is custom-quoted on call volume and seat count.
pricing_faq_a4: Yes. EU data residency (Frankfurt), DPA available, candidate consent flows, audit log + RBAC. See our compliance section.

faq_subtitle_a: Everything you need to know before trying TrueCalling. Missing question?
faq_cta_box_desc: 20 minutes in a demo and you'll know exactly if TrueCalling fits.
faq_q1: What is TrueCalling and what is this AI sourcing software for?
faq_a1: TrueCalling is an AI sourcing software designed for Talent Acquisition teams and recruiting agencies. The platform combines an AI copilot (EMILY), a candidate matching score (TrueFit 360) and multichannel outreach (WhatsApp, email, phone) to turn a brief into qualified candidates in minutes — without switching tools.
faq_q2: How does AI sourcing work at TrueCalling?
faq_a2: You describe the role in natural language. EMILY, our AI copilot, analyzes the brief, queries relevant talent pools and applies over a hundred criteria (skills, context, soft skills) to surface a shortlist ranked by matching score. AI sourcing reduces time-to-hire by immediately targeting the most relevant profiles.
faq_q3: Which channels can I use to contact candidates — WhatsApp, email, phone?
faq_a3: WhatsApp, email and phone, from the same interface. It's our signature: multichannel outreach where each candidate is reached on the channel where they're most likely to reply. WhatsApp hits 98% open rate vs 20% for email — that's why it's central at TrueCalling. Messages are pre-drafted based on the profile and role, and follow-ups are automated.
faq_q4: Does TrueCalling integrate with my ATS (Lever, Greenhouse, Recruitee, Teamtailor, Workable)?
faq_a4: Yes. The Core plan includes one ATS integration and the Enterprise plan offers unlimited integrations. Sourced candidates and their interactions sync automatically with your existing pipeline — TrueCalling enriches your ATS, doesn't replace it.
faq_q5: What does an AI sourcing software like TrueCalling cost and is there a trial?
faq_a5: The Starter plan starts at $595 per user per month, no commitment and no hidden fees. Core is $895 and Enterprise is custom-quoted. Rather than a self-serve free trial, we offer a 20-minute guided demo where we work on one of your open roles live.
faq_q6: How long does it take to get started with TrueCalling and get candidates?
faq_a6: Less than 24 hours between contract signing and first brief live. Onboarding covers role imports, outreach channel setup and ATS integration. A Customer Success manager is dedicated on the Enterprise plan. Most clients receive their first shortlist the same day.
